title: begonia speluncae
intro: Begonia speluncae, also known as cave begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Begonia speluncae include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion to make teas or tonics, and it can also be used to make poultices or salves for topical application.
